name: 7artisans Lens 27mm f/2.8
description:
Compact and versatile, the black Nikon Z-mount 27mm f/2.8 AF Lens from 7artisans Photoelectric provides both manual and autofocus modes for your APS-C capture

A bright prime with a versatile focal length, the 27mm f/2.8 AF Lens from 7artisans Photoelectric sports a lightweight metal build and is designed for Sony E-mount camera systems.

features.Key Features: APS-C | f/2.8 to f/16 | 40.5mm (35mm Equivalent) | STM Stepping AF Motor | Supports Eye Recognition Focus | Minimum Focusing Distance: 1' | 6-Blade Diaphragm | 52mm Filter Thread | Firmware Updates via USB-C | APS-C | f/2.8 to f/16 | 40.5mm (Full-Frame Equivalent) | Manual and Autofocus Modes | De-Clicked Aperture | Minimum Focus Distance: 11.8" | 6-Blade Iris | Upgraded USB Port | Metal Construction
features.What’s In The Box: 7artisans 27mm f/2.8 AF Lens (Sony E) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap | USB-C Cable | 7artisans 27mm f/2.8 AF Lens (Nikon Z, Black) | Front Lens Cap | Rear Lens Cap
